title.v: Tạo chứng từ phân bổ cho các hóa đơn
title.e: Auto Generation of Payment Allocation to Invoices

command.text: declare @message nvarchar(4000) select @message = 'this._authorize$Edit = ' + rtrim(@@sysDatabaseName.dbo.FastBusiness$System$GetAuthorize(@@admin, @@userID, 'RDTran', 'Edit')) select @message = @message + ',this._authorize$New = ' + rtrim(@@sysDatabaseName.dbo.FastBusiness$System$GetAuthorize(@@admin, @@userID, 'RDTran', 'New')) select @message = @message + ',this._authorize$Delete = ' + rtrim(@@sysDatabaseName.dbo.FastBusiness$System$GetAuthorize(@@admin, @@userID, 'RDTran', 'Del')) select @message = @message + ';load$GridReport$(this);load$CheckingReport$(this);' select @message as message return

action.text: select distinct(ma_dvcs) into #unit from cttt50 where ngay_ct between @ngay_tu and @ngay_den and exists(select 1 from @s where patindex('%'+ stt_rec + '%', text) > 0) if @@admin <> 1 begin if exists (select 1 from sysunitrights a join #unit b on a.ma_dvcs = b.ma_dvcs where user_id = @@userID and r_new = 0) or exists (select 1 from #unit a left join (select * from sysunitrights where user_id = @@userID) b on a.ma_dvcs = b.ma_dvcs where b.r_new is null) select 0 else select 1 as r return end select 1 as r return

declare @l varchar(1024) select distinct(stt_rec_pb) into #t from cttt20 where stt_rec = replace(@s, '''', '''''') select @l = coalesce(@l + ',' , '') + stt_rec_pb from #t select count(*) as r, isnull(@l, '###') as l from #t

declare @voucherCode char(3), @fullDelete bit, @$lockedDate nvarchar(512), @$NotAuthorized nvarchar(512) select @voucherCode = 'PT0' select @$NotAuthorized = case when @@language = 'v' then N'Chưa có quyền thực hiện chức năng này hoặc truy cập bị từ chối. Liên hệ với người quản trị hệ thống nếu bạn có thể được truy cập vào chức năng này.' else N'You are not authorized or you do not have permission to execute this action. Contact the System administrator if you believe you should be able to execute this action.' end select stt_rec_pb into #tt from cttt20 where stt_rec = @s and stt_rec_pb <> '' select stt_rec, ngay_ct, so_ct, ma_dvcs, status, user_id0, cast(null as int) as detail_count into #pb from c43$000000 a where exists(select 1 from #tt b where b.stt_rec_pb = a.stt_rec) if not exists(select 1 from #pb) begin select '' as message return end if exists(select 1 from dmttct a join #pb b on a.status = b.status where a.ma_ct = @voucherCode and a.xdel = 1) begin select @$NotAuthorized as message return end if (@@admin <> 1) begin if exists(select 1 from dmttct a join #pb b on a.status = b.status where a.ma_ct = @voucherCode and a.right_yn = 1) begin if not exists(select 1 from @@sysDatabaseName..sysactionrights a join #pb b on a.action_id = b.status where a.user_id = @@userID and a.ma_ct = @voucherCode and a.right_yn = 1) begin select @$NotAuthorized as message return end if exists(select 1 from @@sysDatabaseName..sysstatusrights a join #pb b on a.status_id = b.status where a.user_id = @@userID and a.ma_ct = @voucherCode and r_del = 1) begin select @$NotAuthorized as message return end end if exists(select 1 from #pb where user_id0 <> @@userID) begin exec @@sysDatabaseName.dbo.FastBusiness$System$GetShareAccess @voucherCode, @@userID, @@admin, 2, @fullDelete output if (@fullDelete = 0) begin select @$NotAuthorized as message return end end if not exists(select 1 from sysunitrights a join #pb b on a.ma_dvcs = b.ma_dvcs where a.user_id = @@userID and a.r_del = 1) begin select @$NotAuthorized as message return end end select @$lockedDate = case when @@language = 'v' then N'Đã khóa số liệu, kiểm tra lại ngày giới hạn hoặc ngày khóa sổ.' else N'Data is locked, you must modify system locked date.' end if exists(select 1 from dmstt a cross join #pb b where a.ngay_ks >= b.ngay_ct) begin select @$lockedDate as message return end if exists(select 1 from dmctks a cross join #pb b where a.user_id = @@userID and a.ma_ct = 'PT0' and a.ngay_ks >= b.ngay_ct) begin select @$lockedDate as message return end if exists(select 1 from dmdvcsks a join #pb b on a.ma_dvcs = b.ma_dvcs where a.ngay_ks >= b.ngay_ct) begin select @$lockedDate as message return end update cttt50 set t_tien_pb_nt = 0, t_tien_pb = 0, da_pb = 0, stt_rec_pb = '' where stt_rec = @s delete cttt20 from cttt20 a join #pb b on a.stt_rec_pb = b.stt_rec and a.stt_rec = @s declare @p char(6), @q nvarchar(4000) select convert(char(6), ngay_ct, 112) as p into #part from #pb group by ngay_ct select top 0 stt_rec, cast(null as int) as detail_count into #pbky from #pb select @p = min(p) from #part while @p is not null begin delete #pbky set @q = 'insert into #pbky select stt_rec, null from #pb where convert(char(6), ngay_ct, 112) = ''' + @p + '''' + char(13) + 'delete a from d43$' + @p + ' a where a.stt_rec_phieu = ''' + replace(@s, '''', '''''') + ''' and exists(select 1 from #pbky b where b.stt_rec = a.stt_rec)' + char(13) + 'update #pbky set detail_count = (select count(*) from d43$' + @p + ' b where b.stt_rec = #pbky.stt_rec)' + char(13) + 'delete a from i43$' + @p + ' a where exists(select 1 from #pbky b where b.stt_rec = a.stt_rec and b.detail_count = 0)' + char(13) + 'delete a from m43$' + @p + ' a where exists(select 1 from #pbky b where b.stt_rec = a.stt_rec and b.detail_count = 0)' + char(13) + 'declare @postRec varchar(32)' + char(13) + 'select @postRec = min(stt_rec) from #pbky where detail_count <> 0' + char(13) + 'while @postRec is not null begin' + char(13) + ' update m43$' + @p + ' set datetime2 = getdate(), user_id2 = @@userID where stt_rec = @postRec' + char(13) + ' delete cttt20 where stt_rec_pb = @postRec' + char(13) + ' exec fs_PostRDTran ''m43$' + @p + ''', ''d43$' + @p + ''', @postRec' + char(13) + ' select @postRec = min(stt_rec) from #pbky where detail_count <> 0 and stt_rec > @postRec' + char(13) + 'end' + char(13) + 'update #pb set detail_count = b.detail_count from #pb a join #pbky b on b.stt_rec = b.stt_rec' exec sp_executesql @q -- select @p = min(p) from #part where p > @p end delete c43$000000 from c43$000000 a where exists(select 1 from #pb b where b.stt_rec = a.stt_rec and b.detail_count = 0) select '' as message return
